response.justification: Bogdan is a strong senior generalist with impressive breadth across web, mobile, and systems programming, but he does not meet the core mandatory requirements of this role. His professional C++ experience is limited to roughly seven months at National Instruments in 2014-2015 (plus a thesis project on Linux), far short of the required 5-10 years of hands-on Windows C++. His database experience centers on MongoDB and MySQL rather than SQL Server or Oracle, and his financial exposure (RIDE Capital, a German investment fintech) is adjacent at best, with no fixed income, derivatives, or capital-markets systems work. Recent work is TypeScript/Node and D-language focused, making this a significant mismatch despite his evident engineering quality.
strengths: Deep systems-programming fundamentals, including low-latency, high-throughput services (millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic)
Strong engineering craft: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and open-source tooling authorship
Excellent communication skills evidenced by conference talks, workshops, and course creation
concerns: Only ~7 months of professional C++ experience, and none recent or on the Windows platform at required depth
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; database background is MongoDB/MySQL
No fixed income, derivatives, or capital-markets domain experience; fintech exposure at RIDE is retail-investment oriented

key_factors.factor: No fixed income / capital markets domain
Strong low-latency systems and testing craft
